data.title: Crescent Biopharma partners with Kelun-Biotech, secures $185M funding, accelerates Next Gen Therapeutics for Solid Tumors.
data.description: Collaborating with Kelun-Biotech allows for the expansion of the pipeline and speeds up the combination approach with CR-001, a bispecific antibody targeting PD-1 and VEGF, along with several antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs). This partnership aims to produce clinical data for these products in various international markets as well as in Greater China.

data.title: Middleby will sell 51% of its Residential Kitchen business to 26North for $885 million, retaining 49% stake.
data.description: Elgin, Illinois - The Middleby Corporation (NASDAQ: MIDD) revealed a new development where it will be selling a 51% share in its Residential Kitchen division to entities affiliated with 26North Partners LP. This deal, valued at $885 million, entails the creation of a standalone joint venture for the Residential Kitchen segment. Middleby will retain a 49% interest as a non-controlling partner in this venture and will receive an upfront cash payment.

data.title: Snowflake stock fell after Q3 results; revenue $1.21B beat estimates, earnings at 35c per share. Collaboration updates with Amazon, Accenture.
data.description: Snowflake Inc. (NYSE: SNOW) experienced a drop in stock value following the release of its third-quarter results and a disappointing future outlook, with a slowdown in product revenue growth during this period. Furthermore, Snowflake shared updates on its partnerships with Amazon.com, Inc.'s (NASDAQ: AMZN) Amazon Web Services and Accenture plc (NYSE: ACN), in addition to an extended collaboration with Anthropic. The AI data cloud company reported revenue of $1.21 billion, surpassing analyst projections of $1.18 billion, and adjusted earnings of 35 cents per share, exceeding analyst estimates of 31 cents per share. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ducommun Inc. (NYSE: DCO) named BAE Systems Supplier of the Year for Vertical Launch Systems at Partner2Win Supplier Symposium.
data.description: In Costa Mesa, California, on December 4, 2025, Ducommun Incorporated (NYSE: DCO) was honored with the Vertical Launch Systems Supplier of the Year award at BAE Systems' 'Partner2Win' supplier symposium. This accolade commended Ducommun for its outstanding performance and dedication to operational excellence in the current year.

data.title: Kelun-Biotech and Crescent Biopharma partner to develop CR-001 and SKB105 for oncology treatments worldwide.
data.description: Two biopharmaceutical companies will collaborate to bring CR-001, a novel PD-1 x VEGF bispecific antibody, and SKB105, an antibody-drug conjugate targeting integrin beta-6, to global markets and specifically focus on the Chinese market. This partnership aims to leverage their expertise and resources for the development and commercialization of these innovative therapies. CR-001 and SKB105 have shown promising results in preclinical studies, indicating their potential in treating various diseases. The companies plan to invest significant funds in advancing these products, with an emphasis on reaching patients worldwide and in China, where there is a growing demand for advanced treatment options. This collaboration is a strategic move to expand the reach of these cutting-edge therapies, highlighting the companies' commitment to addressing unmet medical needs on a global scale.

data.title: Kraken Robotics appoints Kim Butler to board and hires Bernard Mills as EVP Defence, enhancing leadership team.
data.description: Today, in St. John's, Newfoundland and Labrador, Kraken Robotics Inc. announced the recruitment of two key members to its leadership. Kim Butler, a CPA and ICD.D, has been appointed to the Board of Directors. In addition, Bernard Mills has joined as the Executive Vice President, Defence. Kraken, listed on TSX-V as PNG and on OTCQB as KRKNF, is optimistic about the expertise these additions will bring to the company's strategic direction.

data.title: 26North and The Middleby Corp partner for $885 million deal for Middleby's Residential Kitchen business.
data.description: A deal has been struck between 26North and Middleby, where affiliates of 26North will acquire a majority stake in Middleby’s Residential Kitchen business.

data.title: MarketAxess reports trading volume and fees: November 2025 highlights steady progress with new initiatives.
data.description: In New York, MarketAxess Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: MKTX) revealed their trading volume and preliminary variable transaction fees per million (“FPM”) for November 2025. Significant numbers from the month include a marked uptick in new initiatives, displaying strong yearly growth in the client-initiated, portfolio trading, and dealer-initiated sectors. The company launched a new platform and achieved notable progress across various channels. The specifics of the data can be found in tables 1-1C and table 2.

data.title: Halliburton promotes Shannon Slocum to COO and board of directors, effective Jan. 1, 2026. Slocum will oversee global operations and development under CEO Jeff Miller.
data.description: Houston-based company Halliburton (NYSE: HAL) has recently promoted Shannon Slocum to the position of Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, and she has been appointed to the board of directors. The promotion is set to take effect on January 1, 2026. In her new role, Slocum will report to Jeff Miller, who serves as the Chairman, President, and CEO of Halliburton. She will oversee the company's worldwide operations, along with areas such as business development, health, safety, environment, and global technology. This move is in line with the company's focus on executing its business strategy efficiently.

data.title: Masan Consumer plans to list on HoSE, aiming for sustained ~20% profit CAGR. Subsidiary of Masan Group.
data.description: In Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam on December 4, 2025, Masan Consumer Corporation (UPCoM: MCH), a branch of Masan Group, unveiled its plan to shift to listing on the Ho Chi Minh City Stock Exchange ("HoSE") during the "MCH Roadshow – HoSE Migration Announcement." This strategic move is part of the Company's larger efforts to expand its presence in the market.

data.title: Jones Soda's Vault-Tec Supply Packs are available at Costco Clubs in the US, first run sold out in days.
data.description: Seattle-based Jones Soda Co. announced that their Fallout™-themed Vault-Tec Supply Pack, available at select Costco Warehouse Clubs in the Northeast United States, sold out within days after its initial release. The first run of the product flew off the shelves shortly after pallets were stocked, marking a high demand for the limited-edition item. The company's stocks, listed as CSE: JSDA and OTCQB: JSDA, experienced a surge in sales due to the popularity of the Fallout™-themed pack.
